title: Remission by one obligee
doc_html:
Art. 1792.  Remission by one obligee

Remission of debt by one solidary obligee releases the obligor but only for the portion of that obligee.

Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
doc_text:
Art. 1792.  Remission by one obligee
Remission of debt by one solidary obligee releases the obligor but only for the portion of that obligee.
Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
